demographics.living_situation: lives at home; was alone at the time of contacting the service

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The burning in my lower back is relentless, painkillers do absolutely nothing, and I cannot take it anymore. It flared up yesterday and tonight I'm panicking and can't cope.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has been unbearable since yesterday and I've hit the point where I can't manage it at home — I need something to bring it down.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 24 hours ago, after doing a small bit of light physical activity
symptom_narrative.duration: constant for the last day, not letting up
symptom_narrative.character: a deep burning that's spread all across my lower back and moves around without settling in one spot
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's ever been — I honestly can't cope with it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all through my lower back, not one particular spot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time since yesterday, no real breaks
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing is helping — the usual painkillers aren't touching it and I can't get comfortable
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: even resting a light hand on my back makes it feel unbearable, and I can't find any position to settle in
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel panicky and I'm breathing really fast because of the pain, and I'm exhausted
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had this back pain for years and it flares up like this from time to time; the scans I've had before only ever showed minor stuff
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm up on my feet pacing around the room because I can't sit or lie still, but I can still walk

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing lower back pain that flares up

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: taken up to the maximum allowed for today already
taken up to the maximum allowed for today already

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home alone tonight, very distressed and exhausted, and worried I'll be tempted to take more painkillers than I should just to get relief

objective_data_offered.value: my heart feels like it's pounding and I'm breathing really fast
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported sensation during acute distress; not a measured value
